notes: Unified verifier: one instance holds BOTH circuit keys. initialize() stores the 5-signal per-payment key, initialize_payroll() the 25-signal aggregate key. verify_and_record enforces the commitment/recipient/tx binding AND stores the proven range and a commitment index; verify_and_record_payroll binds each aggregate line to a recorded payment of the same company with a matching range (closes P1). Validated on testnet (per-payment proof_id 0, verified=true, range 45000..55000 stored). Supersedes payment_verifier CAUK3NRZ (5-signal only) and payroll_verifier CCI4WXRQ (aggregate, total-only binding).
